dict.string: Memoire Studio uses Apple Events only when you ask agents to operate approved apps such as Figma, browsers, editors, and Terminal.
Memoire Studio needs access to selected Desktop workspaces so agents can read, edit, build, and verify local codebases.
Memoire Studio needs access to selected Documents workspaces so agents can read, edit, build, and verify local codebases.
Memoire Studio needs access to selected Downloads workspaces so agents can import artifacts and write generated project outputs.
Memoire Studio needs access to selected network workspaces when you choose to run agents against projects stored on shared volumes.
Memoire Studio needs access to selected removable workspaces when you choose to run agents against projects stored on external drives.
